worktree.name: camelot-qa
worktree.purpose: Parallel test execution for Galahad QA agent — isolated from Lancelot's active edits

sync.strategy: Before each test run, Galahad pulls latest from the main worktree

isolation.description: The QA worktree is read-only for test execution. Galahad never writes code here.

notes: A second worktree already exists at ../camelot-test-swarm (created earlier).
Use ../camelot-qa for Galahad's structured QA runs.
Both share Git objects with the main C:\Users\Public\Cammelot repo.
